a11y.notes: Renders a semantic element (p, span, div, or label) chosen by `as`, forwards `ref`, and inherits the design-system foreground contrast tokens. Use `tone="muted"` on the default `background` — on `muted`/`card` surfaces the muted foreground can fall below WCAG AA. For a real form label use the Label component, which wires the htmlFor association.
